headline: ₹50-200 Cr at risk (routine capex scale, no immediate downside). at stake — Waaree Energies subsidiary launches 3000 MW solar module plant, expanding renewable capacity.
what_matters: No P/E compression or margin erosion; future revenue potential enhanced.
No material cost of capital impact; green financing eligibility may improve over time.
Triggers BRSR, GRI, TCFD, CDP, EU Taxonomy disclosure relevance but no immediate penalty or deadline.
